phrases.cultural_note: The park has a free mini-zoo with deer, peacocks, and swans. It's popular with families.

responses.english: No, the park has no zoo. Strasbourg's zoo is located separately.
responses.french: Non, le parc n'a pas de zoo. Le zoo de Strasbourg est situé ailleurs.

phrases.cultural_note: The Orangerie was built in the 18th century as a retreat. It now houses a restaurant and event space.

responses.english: It's a former building, now a restaurant and event space.
responses.french: C'est un ancien bâtiment, aujourd'hui restaurant et espace événementiel.

phrases.intent_en: Ask about the European Parliament connection
phrases.cultural_note: The park is next to the European Parliament building. You can walk between them in about 10 minutes.

responses.english: Yes, about ten minutes on foot from the park.
responses.french: Oui, à environ dix minutes à pied depuis le parc.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if there is a mini-zoo in the park
phrases.text_local: Y a-t-il un zoo ou une animalerie dans l'Orangerie ?
phrases.pronunciation: ee ah-TEEL uhn ZOO oo oon ah-nee-mah-luh-REE dahn loh-rahn-zhuh-REE
phrases.cultural_note: The Parc de l'Orangerie has a small zoo with storks — the white stork is the emblem of Alsace and nests in the park every summer.

responses.english: Yes, a reserve with storks and deer.
responses.phonetic: wee, oon ray-ZAIRV ah-VEK day see-GOHN-yuh ay day SAIR.
responses.french: Oui, une réserve avec des cigognes et des cerfs.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to hire a pedal boat on the lake
phrases.text_local: Où peut-on louer un pédalo sur le lac ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo puh-TON loo-AY uhn pay-dah-LOH soor luh LAK

responses.english: At the lake kiosk, open in season.
responses.phonetic: oh KYOSK doo LAK, oo-VAIR ahn say-ZON.
responses.french: Au kiosque du lac, ouvert en saison.
